svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Customer Opens the Checkout
svg.desc: The hosted checkout shows amount, token, status, recipient, and reference — the customer pays from their wallet.
svg.text: The hosted checkout shows amount, token, status, recipient, and reference — the customer pays from their wallet.
What the customer pays — USDC on the invoice chain.
Only payable while PENDING; expires after 30 minutes.
On-chain identifiers used to match the settlement.
The customer scans to pay directly from their own
